title: Shooting Starlight

FAQ


<details>
<summary>❔What is Shooting Starlight modpack?</summary>

Shooting Starlight is a is a FULL QUALITY modpack, its made for pure QoL and should not use used to enchance performance, for that, we reccomend TWS's Simplicity Arched modpack

</details>

<details>
<summary>👎Will using this modpack affect my gameplay experience negatively in any way?</summary>

While the modpack is designed to enhance pure visual quality, individual experiences may vary depending on factors such as hardware specifications and compatibility with other mods on the client that are not in the modpack. 

</details>




<details>
<summary>💿Recommened Hardware</summary>

- atleast 8 GB of ram allocated to minecraft 
- NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 or 3060 Ti/AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT
- MD Ryzen 5 5600X/Intel Core i5-12400F or i5-12600K. 

</details>
